outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Live updates: Trump says US team won't visit Pakistan as uncertainty surrounds Iran peace talks
outlets.summary: Comprehensive live updates. Araghchi in Oman meeting Sultan Haitham. Trump says revised proposal 'not enough,' talks could continue by phone. IDF strikes continue in Lebanon. Kharg storage critical.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Talks in Pakistan on hold as Iran's top diplomat leaves Islamabad and Trump's envoys are a no-show
outlets.summary: Frames diplomacy as stalled on all fronts. Araghchi pivoted to Oman. Pakistan says mediation 'moving ahead.' War Powers deadline May 1.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump cancels Witkoff, Kushner's Pakistan trip for Iran negotiations: 'We have all the cards'
outlets.summary: Emphasizes Trump leverage framing. Iran's 'much better paper' arrived 10 minutes after cancellation — proof pressure works. Blockade 'going global.' Israel 'prepared to renew war.'

outlets.name: Washington Examiner
outlets.headline: America's 'growing' blockade of Iran is 'going global'
outlets.summary: Hegseth Pentagon briefing: 'No one sails from the Strait of Hormuz to anywhere in the world without the permission of the United States Navy.' 37 ships redirected. Blockade expanding.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war live: Iran says no talks under siege as FM expected in Pakistan
outlets.summary: Day 58 live updates. Araghchi meets Sultan Haitham in Oman. IDF kills 6 in Lebanon Saturday. Houthis hit Andromeda Star. IMO condemns ship seizures. Pakistan says mediation continuing.

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: Iran War: Hormuz Double Blockade Halts Ship Traffic, Dims Hope for the Economy
outlets.summary: Analysis of dual blockade: both US and Iran controlling strait entry/exit points. 2,800 ships stranded. Mine-clearing could take 6 months. Shipowners say return to normal is months away.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Israeli strikes kill six people in Lebanon on Saturday as ceasefire crumbles
outlets.summary: IDF strikes Khiam and Yohmor al-Shaqif Saturday. 6 killed, 17 wounded. Netanyahu establishes northern civilian protection task force. Hezbollah strikes Israeli APC in Ramyah. Total 2,503 killed.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Israel 'prepared to renew' war against Iran — Defense Minister Katz
outlets.summary: Katz says Israel awaiting US 'green light' to 'return Iran to the age of darkness.' Targets marked. IDF prepared for both defense and attack.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iranian foreign minister, Omani Sultan exchange views on regional developments
outlets.summary: Araghchi met Sultan Haitham at Al Barakah Palace — first Gulf visit since war. Sultan stressed dialogue. Iran demands blockade lifted before talks. Araghchi expected to return to Pakistan then Russia.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran not to enter talks under pressure, threats, blockade: Pres. Pezeshkian
outlets.summary: Pezeshkian told PM Sharif Iran rejects 'forced negotiations' under blockade. Demands US remove 'operational obstacles' first. Iran framing: Washington the obstacle, not Tehran.
